summary: Retain bounded native cache-record state when the exact cold-cache walkthrough fails.

decisions.decision: On the exact cold-cache path, capture the enabled preference count and a maximum of 32 opaque native cache record hashes, sizes, and access timestamps immediately before close, after process restart, and after project reopen. Include that fixed-shape state only when the bounded cached-paint transition fails.
decisions.rationale: Exact clean evidence at 369f1a8 still missed the full cache after successful completion ordering was corrected. The prior DOM-only state cannot distinguish a rejected write, process-loss, corrupt-record removal, or a different lookup key. The new diagnostic preserves that distinction without retaining source, project path, or the opaque project identity.

testEvidence.criterion: A cached-paint timeout must retain the bounded cache diagnostic supplied by the clean restart boundary.
testEvidence.test: Inject fixed-shape before-close, after-restart, and after-open record counts into the DOM fixture and force the 15-second timeout through the bounded timer shim.

red.command: pnpm.cmd exec vitest run tests/scripts/m4-packaged-walkthrough.test.ts -t "retains the final cached-paint DOM state when the transition times out" --reporter=dot
red.outcome: RED: 1/1 failed because the timeout omitted the supplied native cache diagnostic.

green.command: pnpm.cmd exec vitest run tests/scripts/m4-packaged-walkthrough.test.ts -t "retains the final cached-paint DOM state when the transition times out" --reporter=dot
green.outcome: GREEN: 1/1 passed with the fixed-shape diagnostic retained.

testEvidence.criterion: The native snapshot must list records through Tauri without retaining the project identity, and the full harness boundary must typecheck.
testEvidence.test: Exercise the snapshot against a fake Tauri invoke boundary, then run the entire M4 harness unit file and TypeScript no-emit once.

red.outcome: RED: 1/22 failed because the new fixture initially omitted the explicit Vitest spy import.

green.command: pnpm.cmd exec vitest run tests/scripts/m4-packaged-walkthrough.test.ts --reporter=dot; pnpm.cmd run typecheck
green.outcome: GREEN: 22/22 harness tests passed, the project identity was absent from the retained snapshot, and TypeScript no-emit passed.

nearMisses.sought: Exact clean packaged native M4 cold-start cache evidence after the durability-ordering fix
nearMisses.confirmation: The full click still launched exactly one new engine run after restart; clickStarted=true, consoleRunsBefore=2, consoleRunsAfter=3, and host cleanup passed. This disproved completion ordering as the sole cause.

questions: No owner decision is required; this is bounded evidence needed to localize the remaining M4 cache miss.
attestation: No prohibited source was consulted in producing this change.
